projects.name: bmssp
projects.description: ssspx is a clean, typed, and tested implementation of a deterministic Single‑Source Shortest Paths solver for directed graphs with non‑negative weights. It follows a BMSSP‑style divide‑and‑conquer design (levels, FindPivots, bounded base case) and includes a switchable frontier, an optional constant‑outdegree transform.
